questions.question: Why are Large Language Models flexible tools?
options: Because they can physically change their hardware
Because they are trained on many language examples
Because they always know the correct answer
Because they only answer short questions

questions.question: What is a token in a Large Language Model?
options: A word or part of a word

questions.question: Why can an LLM produce responses that sound convincing?
options: Because it predicts language patterns effectively
Because it understands reality exactly like humans
Because it checks every answer with experts
Because it reads new books during every conversation

questions.question: What does the term hallucination mean in AI?
options: The model generates incorrect or invented information
The model deletes old training data
